title: Lunar Mirror
description: A tool for warping players back home or to 0,0.
body:
Adds the Lunar Mirror item, that lets players teleport back to the bed they last slept in or to 0,0 of the world.




### How it works

Player sleeps in a bed and the Lunar Mirror records your bed location. 
Once location is recorded, the player can now warp back to the bed by right clicking with the mirror.

![lunar mirror message when player sleeps in bed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89e0998919b9cf782ea1fbe30950c0793202792d.png)

For warping to 0,0 the player shift + right clicks

### Crafting recipe
![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7834765f6531980105bd58ede7e20351d9abd35c.png)

### How to install datapack and resourcepack
For datapack inside the game, select your world and select "Edit", then "Open World Folder". 
Look for the datapacks folder and then copy paste Lunar Mirror zip file inside.

For resource pack goto "Options", "Resource Packs", and then "Open Pack folder".
Once there copy and paste the lunar mirror zip file inside the folder.

the datapack also acts as a resourcepack.
